name: HWR_SRVY_RSLT_MLTCHOICE
description:
This table will be used to store analyzed result for multiple choice
questions used in the surveys – both single selection and multiple selection

primary_keys.name: HWR_SRVY_RSLT_MLTCHOICE_PK
primary_keys.columns: SURVEY_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, RESPONSE_ID

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber ID associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Question ID associated with the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: QUESTION_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Question Version associated with the Question ID in the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: SURVEY_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date when the Survey was created or conducted.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Answer ID associated with the question that the participants selected.

columns.Name: MEASURE
columns.Comments: This is the Quantitative Measure of how many candidates selected the corresponding answer id for this question for this Survey.

columns.Name: RESULT_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: RESULT_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESULT_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: RESULT_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESULT_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: RESULT_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESULT_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: RESULT_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: SURVEY_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, RESPONSE_ID
